violations.text: Commercially prepared food packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2025
A dog was present in the establishment during time of inspection. Animals are to be excluded from establishment unless animal is a service animal. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the slicer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023
